title: Project S.T.A.C.K. Card Definition
description: Shared required structure for every Project S.T.A.C.K. card definition.

id.description: Permanent unique card-definition ID. Never change this after the card is established.

active.description: Whether this card may appear in normal playtest setup.

count.description: Total physical and virtual copies available in the current module.

cardType.description: Broad gameplay category, such as tacticalReserve, enemy, skill, spell, status, equipment, or hireling.

name.description: Exact card name intended for display and printing.

revision.description: Design revision number for this card definition.

artId.description: Reference to a registered artwork asset.

printTemplate.description: Physical and virtual layout template used for this card.

tags.description: Machine-readable gameplay, search, and distribution tags.

rulesText.description: Exact player-facing rules text intended for the card face.

data.description: Card-type-specific structured data, such as healing amount, weapon damage, enemy HP, or spell targeting.

source.description: Optional internal migration and design-tracking metadata. It is not player-facing and is not printed.
